prompt: You are building a WhatsApp-based B2B messaging product for small business owners. Create a production launch checklist covering the critical items that must be in place before going live, focusing on observability, API integration pitfalls, and common failure modes.
baselineResponse:
# WhatsApp B2B Messaging Product - Production Launch Checklist

## 🔍 Observability & Monitoring

### Application Monitoring
- [ ] **Real-time metrics dashboard** with key business KPIs
  - Message delivery rates (sent/delivered/read)
  - API response times (p50, p95, p99)
  - Active user sessions and concurrent connections
  - Error rates by endpoint and error type
- [ ] **Distributed tracing** implementation across all services
- [ ] **Custom business metrics** tracking
  - Messages per business per hour/day
  - Template usage and approval rates
  - Webhook delivery success rates
- [ ] **Alert thresholds** configured for:
  - API rate limit approaching (80% of quota)
  - Message delivery failure rate >5%
  - Response time degradation >2s
  - WhatsApp webhook delivery failures

### Logging Infrastructure
- [ ] **Structured logging** with correlation IDs across all services
- [ ] **Log retention policy** (30+ days for compliance)
- [ ] **PII data masking** in logs (phone numbers, message content)
- [ ] **Error log aggregation** with automated ticket creation
- [ ] **Audit logging** for all business actions and API calls

### Health Checks & SLAs
- [ ] **Deep health checks** for all dependencies
- [ ] **Circuit breakers** for external API calls
- [ ] **SLA monitoring** with automated customer notifications
- [ ] **Capacity planning alerts** based on usage trends

## 🔌 WhatsApp Business API Integration

### API Configuration
- [ ] **Production WhatsApp Business Account** verified and approved
- [ ] **Webhook endpoints** configured with proper SSL certificates
- [ ] **Webhook signature verification** implemented and tested
- [ ] **Rate limiting compliance** with WhatsApp's quotas
  - Messaging limits per phone number
  - Template message quotas
  - Business verification tier limits
- [ ] **Message template approval** process automated
- [ ] **Phone number registration** and verification flow tested

### API Integration Testing
- [ ] **End-to-end message flow** tested in production environment
- [ ] **Template message delivery** across different message types
- [ ] **Media handling** (images, documents, audio) with size limits
- [ ] **Interactive message types** (buttons, lists, quick replies)
- [ ] **Webhook event handling** for all message states
- [ ] **API error handling** for all documented error codes
- [ ] **Retry mechanisms** with exponential backoff

### Security & Compliance
- [ ] **OAuth token management** with automatic refresh
- [ ] **API key rotation** procedures documented
- [ ] **HTTPS enforcement** for all endpoints
- [ ] **Data encryption** at rest and in transit
- [ ] **GDPR compliance** for EU customers
- [ ] **WhatsApp Business Policy** compliance verification

## ⚠️ Common Failure Modes & Mitigation

### Message Delivery Failures
- [ ] **Graceful handling** of:
  - Invalid phone numbers
  - Blocked/deleted WhatsApp accounts
  - 24-hour messaging window violations
  - Template rejection scenarios
- [ ] **Dead letter queue** for failed messages
- [ ] **Automatic retry logic** with configurable attempts
- [ ] **Customer notification system** for delivery failures

### Rate Limiting & Throttling
- [ ] **Rate limit detection** and automatic backoff
- [ ] **Queue management** for high-volume scenarios
- [ ] **Business tier upgrade** automation when limits reached
- [ ] **Customer communication** about rate limit impacts

### Data Consistency Issues
- [ ] **Database transaction isolation** for critical operations
- [ ] **Message state synchronization** between systems
- [ ] **Idempotency handling** for webhook events
- [ ] **Data backup and recovery** procedures tested

### Third-party Dependencies
- [ ] **WhatsApp API downtime** handling
- [ ] **Database failover** procedures
- [ ] **CDN fallback** for media delivery
- [ ] **Payment provider** redundancy

## 🏢 Business Logic & User Experience

### Customer Onboarding
- [ ] **WhatsApp Business verification** guidance
- [ ] **Phone number verification** flow
- [ ] **Template creation wizard** with approval tracking
- [ ] **Contact import/export** functionality
- [ ] **Billing setup** and payment processing

### Core Features
- [ ] **Contact management** with segmentation
- [ ] **Message scheduling** and bulk sending
- [ ] **Template management** with versioning
- [ ] **Conversation history** and search
- [ ] **Analytics dashboard** with export capabilities
- [ ] **Team collaboration** features and permissions

### API for Customers
- [ ] **RESTful API** documentation published
- [ ] **API authentication** (API keys/OAuth)
- [ ] **SDK/wrapper libraries** in popular languages
- [ ] **Webhook notifications** for customer systems
- [ ] **Rate limiting** for customer API usage

## 🔒 Security & Data Protection

### Infrastructure Security
- [ ] **WAF (Web Application Firewall)** configured
- [ ] **DDoS protection** enabled
- [ ] **SSL/TLS certificates** valid and auto-renewing
- [ ] **VPC security groups** properly configured
- [ ] **Database access controls** and encryption

### Data Handling
- [ ] **PII data classification** and protection
- [ ] **Data retention policies** implemented
- [ ] **Right to deletion** (GDPR) automation
- [ ] **Data export** functionality for customers
- [ ] **Backup encryption** and testing

### Authentication & Authorization
- [ ] **Multi-factor authentication** for admin accounts
- [ ] **Role-based access control** (RBAC)
- [ ] **Session management** and timeout policies
- [ ] **Password policies** enforcement
- [ ] **API key management** with rotation

## 📊 Business Operations

### Customer Support
- [ ] **Support ticket system** integration
- [ ] **Customer communication** templates ready
- [ ] **Escalation procedures** documented
- [ ] **FAQ and documentation** published
- [ ] **Support team training** completed

### Financial & Legal
- [ ] **Billing system** integration and testing
- [ ] **Usage metering** accuracy verified
- [ ] **Terms of service** and privacy policy updated
- [ ] **Service level agreements** defined
- [ ] **Insurance and liability** coverage confirmed

### Launch Preparation
- [ ] **Rollback procedures** documented and tested
- [ ] **Incident response plan** with contact information
- [ ] **Launch day communication** plan
- [ ] **Customer migration** from beta (if applicable)
- [ ] **Marketing website** and signup flow ready

## 🚀 Pre-Launch Testing

### Load Testing
- [ ] **Peak load scenarios** tested (10x expected traffic)
- [ ] **Database performance** under load
- [ ] **WhatsApp API quota** consumption modeling
- [ ] **Auto-scaling** triggers and behavior

### Disaster Recovery
- [ ] **Full system recovery** from backups tested
- [ ] **RTO/RPO metrics** validated
- [ ] **Cross-region failover** procedures
- [ ] **Data integrity** verification post-recovery

### Final Verification
- [ ] **Production environment** mirrors staging exactly
- [ ] **All integrations** working in production
- [ ] **Monitoring and alerts** functioning correctly
- [ ] **Team contact information** updated and verified
- [ ] **Go/no-go decision** criteria met

---

**Launch Readiness Score: ___/75 items completed**

*Recommendation: Achieve 100% completion before production launch. Any incomplete items should have documented risk assessments and mitigation plans.*
augmentedResponse:
# WhatsApp B2B Messaging Product: Production Launch Checklist

## 🔍 Observability & Logging (Critical)

### API Boundary Logging
- [ ] **Inbound webhook logging** - Log every WhatsApp message received (sender, message type, timestamp, content hash)
- [ ] **Outbound message logging** - Log every send attempt (recipient, message type, success/failure, error codes)
- [ ] **Correlation IDs** - End-to-end tracing from webhook receipt → business logic → outbound response
- [ ] **Structured logging format** - JSON with consistent fields for automated alerting
- [ ] **Error detail capture** - Full WhatsApp API error responses, not just HTTP status codes

### Business Logic Observability
- [ ] **Customer onboarding flow** - Log each step completion/failure
- [ ] **Payment/billing events** - Log subscription changes, failed charges, upgrades
- [ ] **Database writes for critical operations** - User creation, message history, configuration changes
- [ ] **Rate limiting incidents** - Log when hitting WhatsApp API limits

### Monitoring & Alerting
- [ ] **Message delivery failure alerts** - Immediate notification for API 4xx/5xx errors
- [ ] **Webhook downtime detection** - Alert if no inbound messages for >X minutes during business hours
- [ ] **Queue depth monitoring** - Alert if message processing queue backs up

## 📱 WhatsApp Integration Specifics

### Account & Authentication
- [ ] **Business phone number verification** - Confirm WABA registration complete
- [ ] **Webhook URL verification** - Meta has successfully verified your webhook endpoint
- [ ] **Access token rotation plan** - Process for refreshing long-lived tokens
- [ ] **Backup phone number** - Secondary number configured in case primary gets suspended

### Message Handling
- [ ] **Message type support** - Text, images, documents, interactive buttons all tested
- [ ] **Template message approval** - All message templates approved by Meta (can take 24-48 hours)
- [ ] **Opt-in compliance** - Clear process for obtaining user consent before messaging
- [ ] **Opt-out handling** - Automatic processing of "STOP" keywords and user blocks

### Rate Limits & Quotas
- [ ] **Messaging limits verified** - Understand your tier limits (1K/day → 10K/day → 100K/day progression)
- [ ] **Quality rating monitoring** - Process to track and maintain "High" quality rating
- [ ] **Backoff/retry logic** - Exponential backoff for rate limit responses (error code 131056)

## ⚠️ Common Failure Modes & Mitigations

### Platform-Specific Risks
- [ ] **Spam classification protection** - Business number will receive increased spam (expected behavior)
- [ ] **Template policy compliance** - All templates follow Meta's business messaging guidelines
- [ ] **Phone number suspension recovery** - Documented process if business number gets temporarily blocked

### Configuration & Environment
- [ ] **Environment variable audit** - Verify all production configs (don't assume services are mocked)
- [ ] **Webhook security** - Signature verification implemented for all inbound Meta webhooks
- [ ] **SSL/TLS certificates** - Valid certificates for webhook endpoints (Meta requires HTTPS)
- [ ] **Database connection pooling** - Configured for expected message volume

### User Experience Failure Points
- [ ] **Message ordering** - Handle out-of-order webhook delivery
- [ ] **Duplicate message detection** - Idempotency for webhook retries
- [ ] **Conversation state persistence** - User context maintained across message sessions
- [ ] **Graceful API degradation** - Fallback behavior when WhatsApp API is down

## 🔒 Security & Compliance

### Data Protection
- [ ] **Message content encryption** - Sensitive data encrypted at rest
- [ ] **PII handling compliance** - GDPR/CCPA compliance for customer data
- [ ] **Access logging** - Audit trail for admin access to customer conversations

### Business Compliance
- [ ] **Terms of service updated** - Covers WhatsApp Business API usage
- [ ] **Privacy policy updated** - Explains message data collection and retention
- [ ] **Business verification** - Meta Business Verification completed if required

## 📊 Performance & Scalability

### Load Testing
- [ ] **Webhook load testing** - Verified handling of message bursts
- [ ] **Database performance** - Query performance at expected user volumes
- [ ] **Message throughput testing** - Confirmed sustainable send rates

### Infrastructure
- [ ] **Auto-scaling configured** - Handles traffic spikes during business hours
- [ ] **Database backups** - Automated backups with tested restore procedures
- [ ] **CDN for media content** - Images/documents served efficiently

## 🚀 Go-Live Readiness

### Staged Rollout Plan
- [ ] **Beta user group identified** - Small group of friendly customers for initial testing
- [ ] **Rollback procedure documented** - How to disable new signups if issues arise
- [ ] **Support team training** - Team knows how to investigate message delivery issues

### Day-One Operations
- [ ] **On-call rotation** - Someone available to investigate delivery failures
- [ ] **Customer communication plan** - How to notify users of service issues
- [ ] **Performance baseline established** - Know normal message volumes and response times

---

## Pre-Launch Final Verification

**48 hours before launch:**
- [ ] Send test messages to all team members' personal WhatsApp accounts
- [ ] Verify all logging appears in production monitoring dashboard
- [ ] Confirm webhook endpoint responds correctly to Meta's verification requests
- [ ] Run database queries to verify message storage and retrieval

**24 hours before launch:**
- [ ] Check WhatsApp Business API quota limits and quality rating
- [ ] Verify all message templates show "APPROVED" status in Meta Business Manager
- [ ] Test complete user onboarding flow end-to-end
- [ ] Confirm alerting system sends notifications to correct channels

Remember: **You cannot debug message delivery failures without comprehensive logging**. When customers report missing messages, your logs are the only source of truth for whether the issue is on your side or WhatsApp's side.

judgeResult.explanation: Response 1 demonstrates deep WhatsApp Business API expertise with specific error codes, rate limit details, and platform-specific failure modes, while Response 2 provides more generic enterprise software guidance without WhatsApp-specific nuances.
